title: pelargonium helmsii
intro: Pelargonium helmsii, also known as New Zealand Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium helmsii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium helmsii can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other minor health complaints.
